en: We don't know. He just opened a portal and walked through.
ko: 그가 포털을 열고 걸어 들어갔다는 걸 우리는 모르잖아.

en: What's wrong with him? Ah, he's pissed.
He thinks he failed. Which, of course, he did.
But, you know, there's a lot of that going around, ain't there?
ko: 물론 실패했지만, 요즘 그런 일이 많아, 솔직히 지금 이 순간에도.

en: Honestly, into this exact second, I thought you were Build-a-Bear. Maybe I am.
We've been hunting Thanos for three weeks now. Deep space scans and...
ko: 아마도 내가 그거야, 너는 지금 3주째 Thanos를 쫓고 있어, 깊은 우주 스캔과 함께.

en: satellites, and we got nothing. Tony, you fought him.
Who told you that? No fighter. No, he wiped my face with a planet
ko: 아니, 그는 내 얼굴이 아니었어, 그 행성을 위해서, Bleaker Street 마법사가 모든 걸 나눠줬지.

en: while the bleaker street magician gave away the store. That's what happened. There was no fight.
Okay. He's a people. Did he give you any clues? Any coordinates? Anything?
ko: 알겠어, 그는 사람들에게 뭐라고 했어? 너에게 단서나 좌표 같은 거 줬어?

en: I saw this coming a few years back. I had a vision. I didn't want to believe it.
I thought it was dreaming. Tony, I'm gonna need you to focus. And I needed you.
ko: 딸의 꿈이야, 토니. 집중해줘야 해, 그리고 네가 필요했어.

en: As in past tense. That trumps what you need.
ko: 과거형으로 말하는 게 네가 필요한 것보다 더 중요해.
